name: health-check-plugin
description: A universal, configurable health-check + healer board for any automation or system. Collects health signals (Postgres, HTTP, shell, custom), scores 0-100, fingerprints and dedups issues, reports to a chat channel for discussion, and — on approval — opens GitHub issues and runs safety-gated auto-heals. Ships a standalone CLI plus skills/agents/commands for Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI.
